jaas:config.name: ldapAvivaCanada
jaas:config.jaas:module: initialContextFactory=com.sun.jndi.ldap.LdapCtxFactor connection.url= ldap://avantageldap.dev.avivaint.ca:389 connection.username= cn=searchcustmersvc_esb_user,ou=people,ou=internal,dc=avivagroup,dc=ca connection.password=abc1234 connection.protocol= context.com.sun.jndi.ldap.connect.pool=true context.com.sun.jndi.ldap.connect.timeout=10000 context.com.sun.jndi.ldap.read.timeout=10000 context.java.naming.referral=ignore user.base.dn=ou=people,ou=internal,dc=avivagroup,dc=ca user.filter=(cn=%u) user.search.subtree=true role.base.dn=ou=groups,ou=internal,dc=avivagroup,dc=ca role.filter=(member=%fqdn) role.name.attribute=cn role.search.subtree=true authentication=simple disableCache=true
